item.title: MixedNotes 0.218
item.description:
New Mac look: flat techy-gray console chrome (SpliceMover style) — capsule tabs, hardware buttons, LED toggles — with the original orange accents kept for notes and songs.
Also includes the bug-hunt fixes: clearer Dropbox connection errors, self-healing folder bookmarks.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.216
item.description:
First Sparkle-updatable release.
- Waveform strip under the liquid circle: real per-song waveform, reflection, drag to seek - Touch-reactive liquid with true water physics (flick, glide, tilt) - Apple Watch app: one-tap audio notes pinned to the playing song - Optional: keep music playing (ducked) while dictating - Mac app auto-updates from this release onward (Sparkle, sandboxed) - Many fixes: persistent design dials, Dropbox connection errors, stale folder bookmarks
